plugins.name: pdca-workflow
plugins.description: A PM-led PDCA feedback loop for AI-assisted projects: /decide decision panel, standalone advise/verify/red-team panel primitives, /retrospect process loop, /pdca-init scaffolding with a project-tailored advisor panel, a version-agnostic ADR system with a zero-dep corpus linter, a metrics-engine spec, and a muda-cutting CLAUDE.md template.
